data.requires: (|Progressive Vegetable Category:1| AND |Progressive Flower Category:1| AND |Progressive Fruit Category:1| AND |Progressive Bug Category:1| AND |Progressive Part Category:1| AND |Progressive Strange Category:1|) AND ({YamlDisabled(collectopaediasanity)} OR ({YamlEnabled(collectopaediasanity)} AND |@Colony 9 Collectopaedia:ALL|))

data.name: Other Collectopaedia Page Completion
data.requires: |Progressive Bug Category:13| AND |Progressive Part Category:13| AND |Progressive Strange Category:21| AND ({YamlDisabled(collectopaediasanity)} OR ({YamlEnabled(collectopaediasanity)} AND |@Other Collectopaedia:ALL|)

data.name: Other Collectopaedia Bug Completion

data.name: Other Collectopaedia Part Completion

data.name: Other Collectopaedia Strange Completion
